VoiceShield uses @pocketpalai/llama.rn, a React Native binding for llama.cpp,
to run user-provided GGUF language models locally on supported Android devices.

The PocketPal AI project and @pocketpalai/llama.rn are MIT licensed:
https://github.com/a-ghorbani/pocketpal-ai/blob/main/LICENSE

GGUF model licenses vary. The user must accept the license of every imported
model before using it in VoiceShield.
